ontology_relation_candidates.label: emittedBy
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates an alarm or emitted signal to the system or device that emits it.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation is semantically stable, reusable across documents and meaningful beyond isolated mentions. It connects events (alarms) to their sources (devices).
